meaning: adj.[蛹望(豁｣)體育噪,荳我ｻｷ體育噪
examples: Aging of cerous carbonate in aqueous solution was investigated.
The surface chemical structure of activated carbon fibers (ACF) was modified by cerous nitrate.
The said tombarthite is one of the kinds such as lanthanum, europium nitrate, erbium nitrate, cerous nitrate and neodymium nitrate.
